name: COBRA KAI
description:
You’re the new kid. You didn’t want to move to the valley, but your parents found good jobs here that would make them more money, so you had to go…why exactly is everyone here so obsessed with Karate? What the hell? You have three weeks before the first day at school here starts. You should probably stop this whole karate gang war going on before someone gets their back broken or something…but maybe, you should join Cobra Kai, little snake.

set at the beginning of season 1
creator: cairefugee1
